title: Measurement Distribution
description: Histogram and SPC statistics (Cpk, Cp) for a selected measurement

list.name: measurement
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT step_name || ' / ' || measurement_name AS m FROM measurements WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m

targets.rawSql: SELECT value FROM measurements WHERE step_name || ' / ' || measurement_name = '${measurement}' AND value IS NOT NULL AND measurement_timestamp BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}'

SELECT round(avg(value), 4) AS mean, round(stddev(value), 4) AS sigma, round(min(value), 4) AS min_val, round(max(value), 4) AS max_val, count(*) AS n, round(first(low_limit), 4) AS lsl, round(first(high_limit), 4) AS usl, round(first(nominal), 4) AS nominal, CASE WHEN stddev(value) > 0 AND first(high_limit) IS NOT NULL AND first(low_limit) IS NOT NULL THEN round((first(high_limit) - first(low_limit)) / (6 * stddev(value)), 2) END AS cp, CASE WHEN stddev(value) > 0 AND first(high_limit) IS NOT NULL AND first(low_limit) IS NOT NULL THEN round(least((first(high_limit) - avg(value)) / (3 * stddev(value)), (avg(value) - first(low_limit)) / (3 * stddev(value))), 2) END AS cpk FROM measurements WHERE step_name || ' / ' || measurement_name = '${measurement}' AND value IS NOT NULL AND measurement_timestamp BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}'

SELECT outcome, count(*) AS cnt FROM measurements WHERE step_name || ' / ' || measurement_name = '${measurement}' AND measurement_timestamp BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' GROUP BY outcome
